title: Tefillin for Beginners: What They Are and How to Wear Them
title_zh: 初学者的经文匣指南：什么是经文匣以及如何佩戴
title_he: תפילין למתחילים: מה הם ואיך להניח אותם
author: Torah Light Editorial Team
target_audience: Beginners with no prior knowledge of Judaism
cultural_context: Chinese readers unfamiliar with Jewish practices
header_image_description: Traditional Chinese ink wash (shan shui) landscape depicting a serene morning mountain scene with mist-covered peaks and a flowing river. In the foreground, a contemplative figure in traditional robes sits on a rock beside the water, with subtle golden rays of dawn light filtering through bamboo groves. The composition suggests spiritual awakening and daily ritual practice, painted in muted grays and earth tones with soft golden accents, conveying a peaceful, meditative atmosphere perfect for morning devotion.
